prompt: anime illustration, light novel style, panoramic dark fantasy landscape, two travelers walking along a desolate road at twilight, a young man with dark hair and an eye patch over his right eye carrying a leather medicine box, and a petite girl with honey-colored hair carrying a harp on her back, they walk side by side with slight distance between them, a vast ruined kingdom visible in the far distance with crumbling spires, the road stretching endlessly ahead through barren fields, dramatic crimson and purple sunset sky, chains subtly woven into the clouds like a motif, atmosphere of melancholy beauty and quiet determination, the weight of secrets between two travelers
